## Problem

What gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the interface, event, or tooling change.

## Compatibility Impact

- [ ] No contract interface impact
- [ ] Backward compatible extension
- [ ] Breaking change (explain migration path)

## Alternatives Considered

## Additional Context

Include examples, prior art, or tradeoff notes.
